title: SPT
description: SPT: A set of data related to Standard Penetration Tests (SPT) carried out.

Id.description: Location identifier relating the borehole to the strata (LOCA_ID).

Top.description: Depth to the top of the sample, measured from the top of the borehole (ISPT_TOP). Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

NumberofBlows.description: SPT Number of Blows during main drive (ISPT_NVAL).

EnergyRatio.description: Energy Ratio of Hammer (ISPT_ERAT). Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

MainTestDrive.description: Number of blows for main test drive (ISPT_MAIN).

TotalPenetration.description: Total Penetration for seating drive and test drive (ISPT_NPEN). Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Properties.description: A list of different properties including references, tests, analysis, results and detection.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
